member.name: T:WaterMeter.Maui.IWaterMeterService
member.summary: Interface for Water Meter SDK platform-specific implementations.

member.name: M:WaterMeter.Maui.IWaterMeterService.InitializeLicenseAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.String)
member.summary: Initialize SDK with license key (required before scanning).

member.name: M:WaterMeter.Maui.IWaterMeterService.IsLicenseValidAsync
member.summary: Check if SDK license is valid.

member.name: M:WaterMeter.Maui.IWaterMeterService.InitializeAsync(WaterMeter.Maui.InitializeOptions)
member.summary: Initialize the SDK engine (iOS only, Android auto-initializes).

member.name: M:WaterMeter.Maui.IWaterMeterService.ScanAsync(WaterMeter.Maui.ScanOptions)
member.summary: Open camera scanner to scan water meter number.
member.returns: Scan result with recognized text and confidence.

member.name: M:WaterMeter.Maui.IWaterMeterService.RecognizeBase64Async(System.String)
member.summary: Recognize water meter reading from base64 encoded image.
member.param: Base64 encoded image (with or without data URL prefix).

member.name: M:WaterMeter.Maui.IWaterMeterService.RecognizeFileAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Recognize water meter reading from file path.

member.name: M:WaterMeter.Maui.IWaterMeterService.CheckPermissionAsync
member.summary: Check if camera permission is granted.

member.name: M:WaterMeter.Maui.IWaterMeterService.RequestPermissionAsync
member.summary: Request camera permission.

member.name: M:WaterMeter.Maui.IWaterMeterService.GetVersionAsync
member.summary: Get SDK version.

member.name: M:WaterMeter.Maui.IWaterMeterService.IsInitializedAsync
member.summary: Check if SDK is initialized.

member.name: M:WaterMeter.Maui.IWaterMeterService.ResetAsync
member.summary: Reset SDK (release resources).

member.name: M:WaterMeter.Maui.IWaterMeterService.OpenSettingsAsync
member.summary: Open SDK settings screen.

member.name: T:WaterMeter.Maui.LicenseStatus
member.summary: License status codes matching native SDK.

member.name: F:WaterMeter.Maui.LicenseStatus.NotInitialized
member.summary: SDK not initialized

member.name: F:WaterMeter.Maui.LicenseStatus.Valid
member.summary: License is valid

member.name: F:WaterMeter.Maui.LicenseStatus.Expired
member.summary: License has expired

member.name: F:WaterMeter.Maui.LicenseStatus.GracePeriod
member.summary: License in grace period

member.name: F:WaterMeter.Maui.LicenseStatus.Invalid
member.summary: Invalid license key

member.name: F:WaterMeter.Maui.LicenseStatus.Blocked
member.summary: License has been blocked

member.name: F:WaterMeter.Maui.LicenseStatus.QuotaExceeded
member.summary: Quota exceeded, sync required

member.name: T:WaterMeter.Maui.LicenseResult
member.summary: Result from license initialization/validation.

member.name: P:WaterMeter.Maui.LicenseResult.Valid
member.summary: Whether the license is valid.

member.name: P:WaterMeter.Maui.LicenseResult.Status
member.summary: License status code.

member.name: P:WaterMeter.Maui.LicenseResult.Message
member.summary: Status message.

member.name: T:WaterMeter.Maui.ScanResult
member.summary: OCR scan result from camera scanner or image recognition.

member.name: P:WaterMeter.Maui.ScanResult.Text
member.summary: Recognized meter reading text.

member.name: P:WaterMeter.Maui.ScanResult.Confidence
member.summary: Recognition confidence (0.0 - 1.0).

member.name: P:WaterMeter.Maui.ScanResult.Success
member.summary: Whether the scan was successful.

member.name: P:WaterMeter.Maui.ScanResult.ImagePath
member.summary: Path to captured image (if available).

member.name: P:WaterMeter.Maui.ScanResult.ImageBase64
member.summary: Base64 encoded image (if available).

member.name: P:WaterMeter.Maui.ScanResult.FormattedReading
member.summary: Formatted reading with decimal point.

member.name: P:WaterMeter.Maui.ScanResult.IsReliable
member.summary: Whether the result is considered reliable.

member.name: P:WaterMeter.Maui.ScanResult.Message
member.summary: Error or status message (if any).

member.name: T:WaterMeter.Maui.ScanOptions
member.summary: Options for camera scanner.

member.name: P:WaterMeter.Maui.ScanOptions.Title
member.summary: Custom title for scanner screen. Default: "Quét số đồng hồ"

member.name: P:WaterMeter.Maui.ScanOptions.ShowCloseButton
member.summary: Show close button. Default: true

member.name: P:WaterMeter.Maui.ScanOptions.AutoCloseOnResult
member.summary: Auto close after scan result. Default: true

member.name: P:WaterMeter.Maui.ScanOptions.AutoCapture
member.summary: Auto capture when meter detected. Uses SDK settings if null.

member.name: P:WaterMeter.Maui.ScanOptions.MinConfidence
member.summary: Minimum confidence threshold (0.0 - 1.0). Uses SDK settings if null.

member.name: P:WaterMeter.Maui.ScanOptions.ImageMaxWidth
member.summary: Max width for saved image in pixels.

member.name: P:WaterMeter.Maui.ScanOptions.ImageMaxHeight
member.summary: Max height for saved image in pixels.

member.name: T:WaterMeter.Maui.InitializeOptions
member.summary: SDK initialization options (iOS only, Android auto-initializes).

member.name: P:WaterMeter.Maui.InitializeOptions.ThreadCount
member.summary: Number of threads for inference. Default: 2

member.name: P:WaterMeter.Maui.InitializeOptions.UseGPU
member.summary: Whether to use GPU acceleration. Default: false

member.name: P:WaterMeter.Maui.InitializeOptions.MaxSideLength
member.summary: Maximum image dimension. Default: 480

member.name: T:WaterMeter.Maui.PermissionResult
member.summary: Permission check result.

member.name: P:WaterMeter.Maui.PermissionResult.Granted
member.summary: Whether permission is granted.

member.name: P:WaterMeter.Maui.PermissionResult.Status
member.summary: Permission status string.

member.name: T:WaterMeter.Maui.Platforms.Android.WaterMeterActivityResultHandler
member.summary: MainActivity base class that handles activity results for Water Meter SDK. Your MainActivity should inherit from this or manually call HandleActivityResult.

member.name: M:WaterMeter.Maui.Platforms.Android.WaterMeterActivityResultHandler.HandleActivityResult(System.Int32,Android.App.Result,Android.Content.Intent)
member.summary: Call this from your MainActivity's OnActivityResult to handle scanner results.

member.name: T:WaterMeter.Maui.Platforms.Android.WaterMeterServiceAndroid
member.summary: Android implementation of IWaterMeterService. Bridges C# calls to Android Water Meter SDK via Java/Kotlin bindings.

member.name: T:WaterMeter.Maui.Platforms.Android.ActivityResultCallbackHelper
member.summary: Helper to handle activity results in MAUI.

member.name: T:WaterMeter.Maui.WaterMeterExtensions
member.summary: Extension methods for registering Water Meter SDK with MAUI.

member.name: M:WaterMeter.Maui.WaterMeterExtensions.UseWaterMeter(Microsoft.Maui.Hosting.MauiAppBuilder)
member.summary: Register Water Meter SDK services with MAUI application. Call this in MauiProgram.cs: builder.UseWaterMeter();

member.name: T:WaterMeter.Maui.WaterMeterSdk
F:WaterMeter.Maui.WaterMeterSdk.Version
member.summary: SDK Version.

member.summary: Get the platform-specific service implementation.

member.summary: Get SDK version.

member.summary: Check if SDK is initialized.

member.summary: Reset SDK (release resources).

member.summary: Open SDK settings screen.

member.summary: Format meter reading with decimal point.

member.name: T:WaterMeter.Maui.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.
